title: Plugin signature verification (ed25519) — deferred from #514
description:
Policy controls (allowlist / blocklist / skipped) shipped in 2cdb248 (crosslink #514 partial). Actual cryptographic signing needs a design pass + new dependency, filed separately.

## Scope
- Evaluate ed25519 crate (ed25519-dalek vs ed25519-compact vs ring) for MSRV fit, license, build-time cost
- Define PluginSignature on-disk shape (sidecar file: plugin.sig next to plugin manifest? inline in manifest? detached)
- TrustedKey config entries (signer pubkey + friendly name + optional key_use scope)
- verify_plugin_signature(manifest_bytes, sig, trusted_keys) + tests
- Wire into PluginManager::install path when policy.require_signatures is true
- CLI: 'openclaudia plugin trust-key <path>' / 'trust-list' / 'trust-revoke'
- Error variant PluginError::UnsignedPlugin / SignatureMismatch / UnknownSigner

## References
- https://rustsec.org/ for dep audit history on the chosen crate
- /home/doll/claude-code/ has no direct equivalent — CC gates at the marketplace layer, we'd be stricter per-plugin
